Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Additive manufacturing of an ultrastrong, deformable Al alloy with nanoscale intermetallics

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition as reported in atomic percent. Powder size -53+15 μm gas atomized powder.

Process_Text.original: Selective laser melting (SLM) performed using SLM 125 HL metal 3D printer in Argon atmosphere with oxygen level below 1000 PPM. Printing conducted with 400 W IPG fiber laser (λ = 1070 nm), laser power 200 W, scan speed 1200 mm/s, hatch space 100 μm, layer thickness 30 μm, laser spot 70 μm diameter. Build plate preheated to 200°C, layer rotation 67°.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of Al92Ti2Fe2Co2Ni2 powder; 200 W laser power, 1200 mm/s scan speed, 100 μm hatch spacing, 30 μm layer thickness, 67° rotation

Process_Info.Equipment: SLM 125 HL metal 3D printer; IPG fiber laser (400 W, λ = 1070 nm)

Microstructure_Text.original: Heterogeneous microstructure with coarse rosettes (36 vol.%), nanoscale cellular precipitates (4 vol.%), and Al-rich matrix (60 vol.%). Coarse rosettes have laminate thickness of 150-300 nm consisting of Al3Ti cores surrounded by alternating Al3Ti and medium-entropy Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 intermetallics. Fine rosettes with laminate spacing 20-60 nm are dominant near melt pool boundaries. Melt pools are ~120 μm wide and ~80 μm deep.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Heterogeneous FCC Al matrix with coarse and fine intermetallic rosettes; Al3Ti and Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 phases with nanoscale lamellar structure

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: Al3Ti DO22 (I4/mmm, a=0.384 nm, c=0.860 nm) and L12 (Pm3m, a=0.398 nm); Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 monoclinic (P21/c, a=0.622 nm, b=0.629 nm, c=0.856 nm, β=94.8°)
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Back scattered SEM; melt pool morphology; coarse/fine rosette distribution
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: BF-TEM, STEM, HRTEM, SAED; phase identification and defect analysis
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.APT: Atom probe tomography; solute distribution and grain boundary segregation
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Nanoindentation: Berkovich tip, 800 nm depth, 100×100 μm area with 121 indents

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); strain rate 10^-3 s^-1
Properties_Info.Note: Engineering stress exceeding 800 MPa with substantial plastic deformability around 20%; typical barreling phenomenon observed
Prominent plastic deformability observed; barreling phenomenon typical of ductile metallic materials

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition as reported in atomic percent. Powder size -53+15 μm gas atomized powder.

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition as reported in atomic percent. Powder size -53+15 μm gas atomized powder.

Process_Text.original: Selective laser melting (SLM) performed using SLM 125 HL metal 3D printer in Argon atmosphere with oxygen level below 1000 PPM. Printing conducted with 400 W IPG fiber laser (λ = 1070 nm), laser power 300 W, scan speed 1200 mm/s, hatch space 100 μm, layer thickness 30 μm, laser spot 70 μm diameter. Build plate preheated to 200°C, layer rotation 67°. Cubic samples 10×10×5 mm printed for microstructure characterization, nanoindentation, and micropillar compression tests.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of Al92Ti2Fe2Co2Ni2 powder; 300 W laser power, 1200 mm/s scan speed, 100 μm hatch spacing, 30 μm layer thickness, 67° rotation

Process_Info.Equipment: SLM 125 HL metal 3D printer; IPG fiber laser (400 W, λ = 1070 nm)

Microstructure_Text.original: Heterogeneous microstructure with coarse rosettes (36 vol.%), nanoscale cellular precipitates (4 vol.%), and Al-rich matrix (60 vol.%) in melt pool center. Fine rosettes (97 vol.%) with thin Al matrix layers (3 vol.%) near melt pool boundaries. Coarse rosettes have laminate thickness of 150-300 nm; fine rosettes have 20-60 nm laminate spacing. Al3Ti cores surrounded by alternating Al3Ti and medium-entropy Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 intermetallics. Cellular boundaries enriched in Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2. Polycrystalline composite colonies ~1 μm in dimension. Melt pools ~120 μm wide and ~80 μm deep.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Heterogeneous FCC Al matrix with gradient from coarse rosettes (center) to fine rosettes (boundaries); Al3Ti and Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 intermetallics with nanolamellar structure

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.XRD: Al3Ti DO22 (I4/mmm, a=0.384 nm, c=0.860 nm) and L12 (Pm3m, a=0.398 nm); Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2 monoclinic (P21/c, a=0.622 nm, b=0.629 nm, c=0.856 nm, β=94.8°)
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Back scattered SEM; melt pool morphology; coarse/fine rosette distribution across XY (horizontal) and XZ (vertical) planes
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: BF-TEM, STEM, HRTEM, SAED, ASTAR orientation mapping; phase identification, defect analysis, orientation relationships: [130]Al3Ti // [100]Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2, (002)Al3Ti // (001)Al9(Fe,Co,Ni)2
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.APT: Atom probe tomography (CAMECA LEAP 5000XS); solute distribution, grain boundary segregation, composition across phases
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.Nanoindentation: Berkovich tip, 800 nm depth, 100×100 μm area with 121 indents (10 μm spacing) using Bruker Hysitron TI Premier

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); strain rate 10^-3 s^-1
Properties_Info.Note: Flow stress decreased compared to 200 W; compressive strain 5-20%
Compressive strain range; uniform deformation strain ~7% followed by toughening

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 100×100 μm area with 121 indents, 10 μm spacing
Properties_Info.Note: Hard melt pool boundaries: 140-150 GPa; soft melt pool interiors: 130-140 GPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); determined from loading-unloading hysteresis loops using σ_b = (σ_1 + σ_2)/2
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Micropillars from fine and coarse rosette regions
Properties_Info.Note: Fine rosettes carry very high back stress ~600 MPa vs ~250 MPa in coarse rosettes; back stress rises quickly and reaches plateau during deformation

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); in situ SEM micropillar compression
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Micropillars: 10 μm height, 5 μm diameter, 2:1 aspect ratio; FIB fabricated
Properties_Info.Note: Fine rosette region shows at least 15% plasticity; uniform co-deformation of matrix and precipitates prevents localized shear bands

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); in situ SEM micropillar compression; strain rate 5×10^-3 s^-1
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Micropillars: 10 μm height, 5 μm diameter, 2:1 aspect ratio; FIB fabricated; 10 and 20 μm diamond flat-punch tips
Properties_Info.Note: Fine rosette region can achieve true flow stress exceeding 900 MPa (up to 1 GPa); coarse rosette region ~500 MPa; engineering stress for fine rosette reaches 1.18 GPa

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at ~298 K (room temperature); displacement-control mode, 800 nm depth
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 100×100 μm area with 121 indents, 10 μm spacing
Properties_Info.Note: Melt pool boundaries: 3.5-4.5 GPa (finer microstructure); melt pool interior: 2.5-3.0 GPa
